description_long: This is an adult male figure dressed in a button-up shirt with rolled sleeves and fitted trousers, giving a smart-casual appearance suitable for urban environments. The shirt is neatly tucked into the pants, which are secured with a belt, and the figure wears formal shoes. The individual has a well-groomed hairstyle with the hair pulled back into a small bun at the back of the head. The facial features are clean-shaven and the expression is neutral, with arms relaxed and slightly bent at the elbows. The overall build is average, with a straight posture and proportional limbs, suggesting a healthy adult male. The clothing fits closely to the body, and there are no visible accessories or carried objects.
description: A smart-casual adult male figure with a button-up shirt, fitted trousers, and formal shoes, standing upright with hair in a bun.
description_view_0: Front view shows the button-up shirt, belt, and facial features with arms slightly outstretched.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the hair bun, profile of the face, and the straight posture.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the shirt, the hair bun, and the fit of the trousers.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile and arm position.
attribute_clothing_type: long-sleeve button-up shirt with rolled sleeves, fitted trousers, and a belt
attribute_hairstyle: short hair pulled back into a bun
